/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/FileManagerQml_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/src/FileOperations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/filemanagerqml_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_FileManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/FileManagerQml_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/FileManagerQml_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/FileManagerQml_qml/Sidebar_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/FileManagerQml_qml/FileGrid_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FileManagerQml.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_FileManagerQml_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o FileManagerQml  /usr/lib64/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
